SEARCH
Package com.nib.supernaut.backbone

Interface IBackboneAtomicLong

All Superinterfaces:
IBackboneObject
All Known Implementing Classes:
EmbeddedAtomicLong
public interface IBackboneAtomicLong extends IBackboneObject
The IBackboneAtomicLong interface provides a set of methods for managing an atomic long value. Atomic long values are typically used in multi-threaded environments where you need to perform long operations atomically without the use of synchronization.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    compareAndSet(long expected, long updated)
    Atomically sets the value to the given updated value if the current value is equal to the expected value.
    long
    get()
    Retrieves the current value of the atomic long.
    long
    incrementAndGet()
    Atomically increments the current value by one and returns the updated value.
    boolean
    isExists()
    Checks if the atomic long value exists.
    void
    set(long value)
    Sets the value of the atomic long.

    Methods inherited from interface com.nib.supernaut.backbone.IBackboneObject

    getKey, getName

  • Method Details

    • isExists

      boolean isExists()
      Checks if the atomic long value exists.
      Returns:
      true if the atomic long value exists, false otherwise

    • get

      long get()
      Retrieves the current value of the atomic long.
      Returns:
      the current value of the atomic long

    • compareAndSet

      boolean compareAndSet(long expected, long updated)
      Atomically sets the value to the given updated value if the current value is equal to the expected value.
      Parameters:
      expected - the expected value
      updated - the new value
      Returns:
      true if successful. False return indicates that the actual value was not equal to the expected value.

    • set

      void set(long value)
      Sets the value of the atomic long.
      Parameters:
      value - the new value

    • incrementAndGet

      long incrementAndGet()
      Atomically increments the current value by one and returns the updated value.
      Returns:
      the updated value
